scenario: exact duplicate page about Voyage embeddings
raw_content: Voyage AI embeddings are used for semantic search. The model is voyage-3-large with 1024 dimensions.
existing_body: Voyage AI provides embeddings via voyage-3-large (1024 dims) for semantic vector search.

raw_content: The BM25 search uses k1=1.2 and b=0.75 parameters for lexical matching.
existing_body: BM25 lexical search is configured with k1=1.2, b=0.75.

raw_content: User relocated to San Francisco in March 2026.
existing_body: User lives in New York City since January 2025.

raw_content: The project now uses PostgreSQL for all data storage.
existing_body: All data is stored in SQLite databases on the local filesystem.

raw_content: Migrated the project from Python 3.10 to Python 3.12 on 2026-06-01.
existing_body: The project uses Python 3.10 as of 2025-12-15.

raw_content: Replaced ESLint with Biome for linting as of 2026-05-30.
existing_body: ESLint is the project linter with custom rules.

raw_content: The RRF fusion now supports configurable K values. Default is K=60 but can be set via config.
